meta.description: Irish residential mortgage rates for new business (owner-occupier). Structurally separate from products.json — mortgages fragment by LTV band, BER rating, fixed term and buyer type, so they cannot be ranked in the flat loans table. NOT yet published to any live page.
meta.primarySource: Each lender's official rates page where fetchable without JavaScript; CCPC's mortgage comparison backend (compare.ccpc.ie) for lenders whose sites block automated fetches, and as a cross-check for all lenders.

fieldNotes.ratePercent: Initial/discounted rate (CCPC DiscountedRate; matches lender-published headline rate).
fieldNotes.aprcPercent: APRC (CCPC FullRate). Null only where no APRC is published — never estimated locally.
fieldNotes.followOnRatePercent: Variable rate the loan rolls to after the fixed period (CCPC FollowOnRate).
fieldNotes.ltvMinPercent/ltvMaxPercent: LTV band bounds; null where the lender does not price by LTV (e.g. Bank of Ireland prices by BER instead).
fieldNotes.berRequirement: BER letter range required for the rate (e.g. 'A-B' for green rates); null = no BER condition.
fieldNotes.buyerTypes: first-time-buyer / mover / switcher. FTB and mover pricing is identical across all lenders as of the generated date; switcher products are listed separately by CCPC.
fieldNotes.sourceMode: lender-page+ccpc-agree = extracted from lender's own page AND confirmed against CCPC; ccpc-only = lender page blocks automated fetch or is JS-rendered, CCPC is the only machine-readable source; SOURCES_CONFLICT = lender page and CCPC disagree, see notes.

lenders.name: AIB
lenders.notes: Static rates page parses cleanly. APRC shown as '--' in static HTML (JS-populated) — APRC values in this file come from CCPC.

lenders.name: Avant Money
lenders.notes: HTTP 403 to automated fetches (consistent with their loan pages). Rates sourced from CCPC only.

lenders.name: Bank of Ireland
lenders.legalName: The Governor and Company of the Bank of Ireland
lenders.notes: Prices by BER (EcoSaver), not LTV. Static page exposes High Value Mortgage tables, variable rates and the cashback trade-off (5yr fixed 3.50% no-cashback vs 4.00% with cashback); full BER matrix from CCPC, spot-checked against the page.

lenders.name: Credit Union Mortgages
lenders.notes: Single product: Capped Variable 3.85% (APRC 3.92%), capped at 4.40% for first 3 years. Distributed through 51 participating credit unions (list on their enquiry form). Individual credit unions may also offer their own mortgages outside this platform.

lenders.name: EBS
lenders.notes: HTTP 403 to automated fetches. Rates sourced from CCPC only.

lenders.name: Haven Mortgages
lenders.notes: AIB Group's broker channel. HTTP 403 to automated fetches. Rates sourced from CCPC only.

lenders.name: ICS Mortgages
lenders.legalName: Dilosk DAC trading as ICS Mortgages
lenders.notes: Page states rates correct as of 01.07.2026; APRC calculated on €300k over 30 years. All 26 rows confirmed against CCPC. Notably above-market pricing on fixed rates.

lenders.name: MoCo
lenders.notes: All 18 rows (3yr/5yr fixed x 5 LTV bands) confirmed against CCPC including APRC.

lenders.name: Nua Money
lenders.notes: Rates page is JS-rendered (static HTML contains no rate data — the only %-tokens are CSS colour values). Rates sourced from CCPC only.

lenders.name: PTSB
lenders.notes: HTTP 403 to automated fetches (consistent with their loan pages). Rates sourced from CCPC only.

lenders.name: Finance Ireland
lenders.notes: NOT active for new mortgage business: their rates page labels all variable and fixed tables 'existing customers' only, and they are absent from CCPC's comparison of new-business rates. No rate rows included.
